name: Playing Cricket
longDescription: Cricket is more than just a game for me; it's a test of strategy, patience, and teamwork. Whether it's batting under pressure or strategizing in the field, I love the competitive spirit and camaraderie it builds. I regularly play matches on weekends and follow international tournaments passionately.

name: Writing Monologues
longDescription: Writing monologues allows me to step into different characters' shoes and explore complex emotions. It's a creative outlet where I can craft compelling narratives and explore the human psyche through words. I enjoy experimenting with different tones, from dramatic to comedic.

name: Chess
longDescription: Chess is my mental gym. Every game is a new puzzle that requires foresight, pattern recognition, and adaptability. I love the beautiful complexity of the game and how one small move can change the entire outcome. It teaches me to think several steps ahead in life as well.

name: Playing Flute
description: Exploring the soulful melodies of the flute.
longDescription: The flute connects me to a deeper sense of peace and rhythm. Learning to control breath and produce pure tones is a meditative practice. I enjoy playing classical ragas as well as contemporary tunes, finding joy in the simple beauty of a melody.

name: Building Web Templates
description: Designing and coding reusable web templates.
longDescription: I have a knack for creating clean, reusable, and aesthetically pleasing web structures. It involves a blend of design thinking and coding efficiency. I love experimenting with new CSS frameworks, animation libraries like Framer Motion, and creating seamless user experiences.

name: Online Gaming
description: Competitively playing strategy and FPS games.
longDescription: Gaming is my way to unwind and stay sharp. Whether it's the fast-paced action of FPS games or the long-term planning in strategy games, I enjoy the challenge and the community. It also helps refine my reflexes and quick decision-making skills.

name: Creating Content
longDescription: I believe in the power of sharing knowledge. Creating content, whether it's tech tutorials, blog posts, or creative videos, allows me to clarify my own thoughts and help others. It's a journey of continuous learning and community building.

name: Participating in Hackathons
longDescription: Hackathons are the ultimate test of coding skills and teamwork. The adrenaline rush of building a working prototype in 24-48 hours is addictive. It pushes me to learn new technologies on the fly and solve real-world problems under pressure.
